title: Wearables security device
abstract: A merchandise display security device for displaying and protecting a wearable device from theft is provided. In one example, the wearable device includes a body and a band secured thereto. The merchandise security device includes a sensor configured to be coupled to the wearable device between the body and the band. The sensor includes a connector configured to engage an input port of the body for detecting unauthorized removal of the body from the band.
claims:
Claims That which is claimed is: 1. A merchandise display security device for displaying and protecting a wearable device from theft, the wearable device comprising a body and a band secured thereto, the security device comprising: a sensor configured to be coupled to the wearable device between the body and the band, the sensor comprising a connector configured to engage an input port of the body for detecting unauthorized removal of the body from the band. 2. The security device of Claim 1, wherein the sensor comprises an opening configured to receive and secure an end of the band. 3. The security device of Claim 1, wherein the sensor further comprises a cable, and wherein the cable is configured to define a sense loop through the cable and the connector when the connector is engaged with the input port of the body. 4. The security device of Claim 3, further comprising an alarm module coupled to the cable, wherein the alarm module is configured to generate a security signal in response to interruption of the sense loop. 5. The security device of Claim 3, wherein the cable is configured to transfer power to the body via engagement of the connector and the input port. 6. The security device of Claim 1, wherein the sensor is configured to attach the body to the band. 7. The security device of Claim 1, wherein the sensor is configured to be coupled to the wearable device between the body and the band such that the sensor secures the body to the band. 8. The security device of Claim 1, wherein the connector is a USB, USB -A, micro-USB, or USB-C connector. 9. The security device of Claim 1, wherein the connector is a proprietary connector. 10. A merchandise display security device for displaying and protecting a wearable device from theft, the wearable device comprising a body and a band secured thereto, the security device comprising: a sensor configured to be coupled to the wearable device between the body and the band, the sensor configured to be electrically connected to the body for detecting unauthorized removal of the body from the band. 11. A merchandise display security device for displaying and protecting an article of merchandise from theft, the article of merchandise comprising a first component and a second component secured thereto, the security device comprising: 

 a sensor configured to be coupled to the article of merchandise between the first component and the second component, the sensor configured to be electrically connected to the first component for detecting unauthorized removal of the first component from the second component. 12. A merchandise display security device for displaying and protecting a wearable device from theft, the security device comprising: a wearable device comprising a body and a band secured thereto, the body comprising an input port; and a sensor configured to be coupled to the wearable device between the body and the band, the sensor comprising a connector configured to engage the input port, wherein the sensor is configured to detect unauthorized removal of the body from the band. 13. The security device of Claim 12, wherein the wearable device comprises a wrist watch. 14. A merchandise display security device for displaying and protecting a wearable device from theft, the security device comprising: a wearable device comprising a body and a band secured thereto; and a sensor configured to be coupled to the wearable device between the body and the band, the sensor configured to be electrically connected to the body, wherein the sensor is configured to detect unauthorized removal of the body from the band. 15. A merchandise display security device for displaying and protecting an article of merchandise, the security device comprising: an article of merchandise comprising a first component and a second component secured thereto; and a sensor configured to be coupled to the article of merchandise between the first component and the second component, the sensor configured to be electrically connected to the first component, wherein the sensor is configured to detect unauthorized removal of the first component from the second component. 16. The security device of Claim 15, wherein the article of merchandise comprises a wearable device. 17. A method of displaying and protecting a wearable device from theft, the wearable device comprising a body and a band secured thereto, the method comprising: coupling a sensor to the body such that a connector on the sensor engages an input port of the body; attaching the band to the sensor such that the sensor is disposed between the body and the band; and arming the security device for detecting unauthorized removal of the body from the band with the 

 sensing device. 18. A method of displaying and protecting a wearable device from theft, the wearable device comprising a body and a band secured thereto, the method comprising: coupling a sensor to the body such that the sensor is electrically connected to the body; attaching the band to the sensor such that the sensor is disposed between the body and the band; and arming the security device for detecting unauthorized removal of the body from the band with the sensing device. 19. A method of displaying and protecting an article of merchandise from theft, the article of merchandise comprising a first component and a second component secured thereto, the method comprising: coupling a sensor to the first component such that the sensor is electrically connected to the first component; attaching the second component to the sensor such that the sensor is disposed between the body and the band; and arming the security device for detecting unauthorized removal of the body from the band with the sensing device.
